message:
test(models): add integration tests for relative file:// value resolution with base_dir

Adds two tests verifying the base_dir-relative file path resolution
introduced in the previous commit:

- model_registry_load_resolves_relative_file_values_against_models_json_dir:
  End-to-end test creating a models.json in a nested directory with
  file:relative_key.txt for apiKey, provider headers, and model headers,
  then verifying all three resolve correctly against the models.json
  parent directory

- resolve_value_file_relative_to_base_dir: Unit test verifying
  resolve_value_with_base correctly joins relative paths with base_dir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
